title: Russell Hobbs RH00846EU Nightfall Stone Non-Stick Saucepan - Pressed Aluminium Milk Saucepan with Tempered Glass Lid, 20cm/2.6L Sauce Pot for Induction, Small Cooking Pot with Soft Bakelite Handle
features: Whip up delicious meals for all the family using this durable and long-lasting 20 cm non-stick saucepan from Russell Hobbs.
Made from hardwearing pressed aluminium, the high-quality blue marble two-layer non-stick interior means you can cook with less oil.
Complete with a tempered glass lid that features a practical steam vent, this saucepan measures a convenient 39 x 20 x 9 cm.
Featuring a heat resistant exterior and a comfortable Bakelite handle, this Russell Hobbs saucepan is made with your safety in mind.
With a sleek and charming dark blue marble design, this handy saucepan has an induction suitable base and is ideal for most home hobs.
description: Product Description Nightfall Stone Collection Revolutionise your cooking experience with the Russell Hobbs Nightfall Collection, designed to aid with most culinary tasks. Moulded from strong carbon steel, this cookware is long-lasting to keep you cooking for longer. Previous page Blue Marble Design Sporting a sleek dark blue marble design, induction suitable bases. Bakelite Handles Made with a heat resistant exterior and comfortable Bakelite handles. Tempered Glass Lid Stockpots and saucepans include a tempered glass lid with a practical steam vent. Lightweight Wonderfully lightweight and easy to manoeuvre around the kitchen. Get The Set! The set includes fry pans, saucepans, stock pots & a stir fry pan, all suitable for most hob types. Next page 1 Blue Marble Design 2 Bakelite Handles 3 Tempered Glass Lid 4 Lightweight 5 Get The Set! With stunning pans that are both practical and attractive, high quality bakeware, laundry solutions and long-lasting kitchen utensils. All of Russell Hobbs products are high quality and trusted nationwide.
